title: LCID Stock News: Retail Sentiment and Market Analysis
text: LCID Stock News and Market Analysis. Recent Stock Performance & News. Lucid's recent decline has been driven by operational and financial setbacks, including the company reporting 5,500 vehicles produced but only 3,093 vehicles delivered, owing to a 29-day disruption in Gravity SUV deliveries. LCID Stock has lost 75% over the past 12 months and is trading near the bottom of its 52-week range and below its 200-day simple moving average. Analyst Sentiment. Two of 12 analysts covering LCID rate it 'Buy,' while seven rate it 'Hold,' and three rate it 'Sell' or lower. The 12-month average price target is $12.77, representing potential upside of over 100%. Recent analyst downgrades: TD Cowen lowered its price target to $10 from $19, while Baird slashed the price target to $12 from $14 with a 'Neutral' rating. Retail Sentiment. On Stocktwits, retail sentiment around LCID stayed within the 'extremely bullish' territory over the past 24 hours. Market Analysis. The stock shows mixed technical signals, with the RSI(14) value of 34.43 indicating LCID is neither overbought nor oversold.
